---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new edge, workflow, or market analysis capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Trading Problem

What trader workflow or decision is currently unsupported?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the idea at a high level.

## Edge Rationale

Explain how this should improve selection quality, risk management, or review quality.

## Data Requirements

Describe the data needed to support the feature.

## Success Criteria

How would we know the feature is working well?
